message:
feat(tui): add configurable pane split percentages and interactive resize controls

Introduce PaneSplitState struct that stores per-breakpoint list/detail
split percentages and per-layout history pane proportions, replacing
the hardcoded Breakpoint::list_pct()/detail_pct() constants. This
allows runtime pane resizing via keyboard controls with clamping to
25-75% range.

Add adjust_two_pane() and adjust_history() methods with boundary
enforcement, supporting both two-pane (list/detail) and multi-pane
(history timeline/middle/detail) layouts. History splits support 3-pane
(standard/git) and 4-pane (wide bead) configurations. The
adjust_split_pair helper ensures minimum pane sizes are respected.

Mark detail_pct() as #[cfg(test)] since runtime detail percentage is
now derived from 100 - list_pct via PaneSplitState::two_pane_detail_pct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
